'''Oolidi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Expansion Region]]. Oolidi was also the [[Oolid]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
